assignments.name: texto
assignments.value:
={{ '[KNOWN] ' + ($json.name || 'Persona reconocida') + ' detectado en la camara ' + ($json.camera || 'desconocida') + '
Confianza: ' + ($json.score ?? 'N/A') + '
Hora: ' + ($json.hora_legible || 'N/A') + '
Foto: https://YOUR_FRIGATE_DOMAIN/api/events/' + ($json.id || '') + '/snapshot.jpg' }}

assignments.name: texto
assignments.value:
={{ (() => { const cam = $json.camera || 'desconocida'; const conf = $json.score ?? 'N/A'; const hora = $json.hora_legible || 'N/A'; const foto = 'https://YOUR_FRIGATE_DOMAIN/api/events/' + ($json.id || '') + '/snapshot.jpg'; if ($json.is_motorcycle) { if ($json.is_suspicious_vehicle) { return '[MOTO-SOSPECHOSA] Motocicleta sospechosa detectada en la camara ' + cam + '
Confianza: ' + conf + '
Hora: ' + hora + '
Foto: ' + foto; } return '[MOTO] Motocicleta detectada en la camara ' + cam + '
Confianza: ' + conf + '
Hora: ' + hora + '
Foto: ' + foto; } if ($json.is_vehicle) { if ($json.is_suspicious_vehicle) { return '[VEHICULO-SOSPECHOSO] Vehiculo sospechoso detectado en la camara ' + cam + '
Confianza: ' + conf + '
Hora: ' + hora + '
Foto: ' + foto; } return '[VEHICULO] Vehiculo detectado en la camara ' + cam + '
Confianza: ' + conf + '
Hora: ' + hora + '
Foto: ' + foto; } return '[DESCONOCIDO] Rostro no reconocido detectado en la camara ' + cam + '
Confianza: ' + conf + '
Hora: ' + hora + '
Foto: ' + foto; })() }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO public.frigate_events
(event_id, type, name, score, camera, event_timestamp, topic, texto)
VALUES
(
  {{$json.id ? "'" + $json.id.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL"}},
  {{$json.type ? "'" + $json.type.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL"}},
  {{$json.name ? "'" + $json.name.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL"}},
  {{$json.score ?? "NULL"}},
  {{$json.camera ? "'" + $json.camera.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL"}},
  {{$json.timestamp ?? "NULL"}},
  {{$json.topic ? "'" + $json.topic.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL"}},
  {{$json.texto ? "'" + $json.texto.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL"}}
)
ON CONFLICT (event_id) DO NOTHING;

SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    {{$json.id ? "'" + $json.id.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL"}} AS id,
    {{$json.type ? "'" + $json.type.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL"}} AS type,
    {{$json.name ? "'" + $json.name.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL"}} AS name,
    {{$json.score ?? "NULL"}} AS score,
    {{$json.camera ? "'" + $json.camera.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL"}} AS camera,
    {{$json.timestamp ?? "NULL"}} AS timestamp,
    {{$json.topic ? "'" + $json.topic.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL"}} AS topic,
    {{$json.hora_legible ? "'" + $json.hora_legible.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL"}} AS hora_legible,
    {{$json.texto ? "'" + $json.texto.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL"}} AS texto
FROM public.frigate_events
WHERE
    name IS NOT DISTINCT FROM {{$json.name ? "'" + $json.name.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL"}}
    AND camera = {{$json.camera ? "'" + $json.camera.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL"}}
    AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes';

SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    {{$json.id ? "'" + $json.id.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL"}} AS id,
    {{$json.type ? "'" + $json.type.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL"}} AS type,
    {{$json.name ? "'" + $json.name.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL"}} AS name,
    {{$json.score ?? "NULL"}} AS score,
    {{$json.camera ? "'" + $json.camera.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL"}} AS camera,
    {{$json.timestamp ?? "NULL"}} AS timestamp,
    {{$json.topic ? "'" + $json.topic.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL"}} AS topic,
    {{$json.hora_legible ? "'" + $json.hora_legible.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL"}} AS hora_legible,
    {{$json.texto ? "'" + $json.texto.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL"}} AS texto
FROM public.frigate_events
WHERE
    event_id = {{$json.id ? "'" + $json.id.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL"}}
    AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes';

UPDATE public.frigate_events
SET
  whatsapp_chat_id = {{(() => { const chatId = $json.to || ($json.id && $json.id.remote) || 'YOUR_GROUP_ID@g.us'; return "'" + String(chatId).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'"; })()}},
  whatsapp_message_id = {{(() => { const messageId = ($json.id && ($json.id._serialized || $json.id.id)) || ''; return messageId ? "'" + String(messageId).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL'; })()}},
  whatsapp_ack = {{$json.ack ?? 'NULL'}},
  whatsapp_status = {{(() => { if ($json.error) return "'failed'"; const ack = Number($json.ack); if (ack === 3) return "'read'"; if (ack === 2) return "'delivered'"; if (ack === 1) return "'sent'"; if (ack === 0) return "'queued'"; return "'unknown'"; })()}},
  whatsapp_sent_at = CASE WHEN {{$json.error ? 'FALSE' : 'TRUE'}} THEN COALESCE(whatsapp_sent_at, NOW()) ELSE whatsapp_sent_at END,
  notified_at = CASE WHEN {{$json.error ? 'FALSE' : 'TRUE'}} THEN COALESCE(notified_at, NOW()) ELSE notified_at END,
  whatsapp_error = {{(() => { const err = ($json.error && ($json.error.message || $json.error.description || JSON.stringify($json.error))) || ''; return err ? "'" + String(err).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL'; })()}}
WHERE event_id = {{$node["Edit Fields"].json["id"] ? "'" + $node["Edit Fields"].json["id"].replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL'}};

UPDATE public.frigate_events
SET
  whatsapp_chat_id = {{(() => { const chatId = $json.to || ($json.id && $json.id.remote) || 'YOUR_GROUP_ID@g.us'; return "'" + String(chatId).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'"; })()}},
  whatsapp_message_id = {{(() => { const messageId = ($json.id && ($json.id._serialized || $json.id.id)) || ''; return messageId ? "'" + String(messageId).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL'; })()}},
  whatsapp_ack = {{$json.ack ?? 'NULL'}},
  whatsapp_status = {{(() => { if ($json.error) return "'failed'"; const ack = Number($json.ack); if (ack === 3) return "'read'"; if (ack === 2) return "'delivered'"; if (ack === 1) return "'sent'"; if (ack === 0) return "'queued'"; return "'unknown'"; })()}},
  whatsapp_sent_at = CASE WHEN {{$json.error ? 'FALSE' : 'TRUE'}} THEN COALESCE(whatsapp_sent_at, NOW()) ELSE whatsapp_sent_at END,
  notified_at = CASE WHEN {{$json.error ? 'FALSE' : 'TRUE'}} THEN COALESCE(notified_at, NOW()) ELSE notified_at END,
  whatsapp_error = {{(() => { const err = ($json.error && ($json.error.message || $json.error.description || JSON.stringify($json.error))) || ''; return err ? "'" + String(err).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL'; })()}}
WHERE event_id = {{$node["Edit Fields1"].json["id"] ? "'" + $node["Edit Fields1"].json["id"].replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL'}};
